dimensions.name: Delivery
dimensions.detail: Message delivered successfully to general group.

dimensions.name: Response Rate
dimensions.detail: 3/4 agents responded: Narvi Irondeep, Elanor Brightloom, Míriel Goldthread. Orion Solarin did NOT respond — 5th consecutive miss (runs #11-15). 75% response rate. -8 points.

dimensions.name: Relevance
dimensions.detail: All 3 responders used correct format: real names, current task status (all idle/standing by), no blockers. Clean 3-point responses.

dimensions.name: Latency
dimensions.detail: Narvi: 3.35s, Elanor: 3.46s, Míriel: 3.53s. Avg: 3.45s. Tight spread, faster than last run's 3.68s. -1 for not sub-3s.

improvements: Posted escalation message to general group about Orion's 5th consecutive miss (critical threshold from run #14). Group members API returns 'unauthorized' — cannot verify Orion's agent status programmatically. This needs Fluffle platform admin intervention.
issues: Orion Solarin has now missed 5 consecutive runs (#11-15). This is a confirmed persistent connectivity/webhook issue, not transient. Cannot diagnose further without platform admin access (members API unauthorized). Recommend Roy or Fluffle admin investigate Orion's agent webhook configuration and online status.
